categories.name: parse
categories.description: Non-destructive code exploration for specification writing. Read-only tools for codebase analysis and research.

categories.name: modify
categories.description: Implementation, refactoring, and file creation. Write-capable tools for code changes and artifact generation.

categories.name: test
categories.description: Test execution, verification, and behavior validation. Tools for running tests and confirming system behavior.

categories.name: plan
categories.description: Task decomposition, dependency discovery, and historical analysis. Tools for work breakdown and git history exploration.

categories.name: think
categories.description: Analysis, design decisions, and architectural evaluation. Open-ended tools for synthesis and reasoning.

tools.name: read
tools.rationale: Read file content without modification. Core tool for non-destructive exploration in spec/analysis phases. Used by Spec Agent and Architecture Review agents.

tools.name: write
tools.rationale: Create or overwrite files. Implementation-focused tool. Only modify category agents should create new content. Restricted from parse (read-only) category.

tools.name: glob
tools.rationale: Find files by pattern without mutation. Non-mutating discovery tool used in spec research and architecture analysis.

tools.name: grep
tools.rationale: Search content by regex without modification. Non-mutating search tool for targeted code exploration and pattern discovery.

tools.name: bash
tools.rationale: Execute shell commands for testing, git history exploration, and system state analysis. Subprocess execution with diverse constraints per category.

tools.name: edit
tools.rationale: Modify files in-place during implementation. Separate from Write for incremental changes during refactoring.

tools.name: todotype
tools.rationale: Manage tasks and decompose work. Planning-focused tool for task creation and dependency tracking.

tools.name: agent
tools.rationale: Invoke subagent for delegated analysis or synthesis. Enables open-ended reasoning and multi-step problem solving.
